series_metadata.series_title: Mandatory Pooling Hearing Notice and Order Notice
series_metadata.series_description: Mandatory Pooling Hearing Notices and Exhibits, Hearing Notice Tracking Spreadsheets, and proof of mailings, including certified mail signature pages, Simple Certified labels, and certified mail signature pages. This record series includes all hearing notice returned mail and order notice returned mail.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 years after an Order is issued on the application or 2 years after a pending application is withdrawn. If records are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be shredded at that time. ; Electronic: 2 years after an Order is issued on the application or 2 years after a pending application is withdrawn., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
